# Depth Of Investigation

**Summary**: The depth to which a geophysical method can reliably provide data.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] estimated the depth-of-investigation using noise analysis and signal strength.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] Determines the practical limits of the survey for aquifer characterization.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] Calculated using the 1/2 power rule and signal-to-noise ratios.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Depth is influenced by the strength of naturally occurring noise and the transmitter's moment. ([[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025, p. 58]])
